The world's most popular tourist destination is becoming a bit pricier.

Select a question above orask something else

Travelers heading to Paris better be ready to pay higher tourist taxes on their hotel rooms and alternative accommodations this year.

On January 1, tourist taxes on travel stays more than doubled. The tourist tax hikes come as Paris prepares to host the Olympics this summer.

Below is an overview of the tourist tax hikes.

Tags:france,olympics,paris

Paris has substantially increased tourist taxes on accommodations in preparation for the 2024 Olympics. Hotel room rates and entrance fees to attractions like the Louvre have risen, and local tour guides are also charging more for their services. These changes come as Paris was labeled the 'world's most powerful city destination' in 2023 by the World Travel and Tourism Council.

title: Paris Tourist Taxes Skyrocket Ahead of 2024 Olympics
author: Dawit Habtemariam
description: Travelers heading to Paris better be ready to pay higher taxes on their hotel rooms this year. As of January, Paris's tourist taxes will jump.
